channel.title: The Independent Wire
channel.description: Automated daily round-up of reporting from independent and investigative journalists, with on-air attribution and source links.
channel.itunes:author: Automated round-up

item.title: The Independent Wire — July 19, 2026
item.description: 2 stories from independent journalists including Aaron Rupar, Judd Legum. Full source links on the episode page.

item.title: The Independent Wire — July 18, 2026
item.description: 12 stories from independent journalists including Aaron Rupar, Drop Site team, Judd Legum, Ken Klippenstein, Marisa Kabas, Matt Taibbi. Full source links on the episode page.

item.title: The Independent Wire — July 17, 2026
item.description: 14 stories from independent journalists including Aaron Rupar, Bellingcat, Bellingcat team, Drop Site team, Judd Legum, Matt Taibbi. Full source links on the episode page.

item.description: 14 stories from independent journalists including Aaron Rupar, Bellingcat, Drop Site team, Judd Legum, Ken Klippenstein, Marisa Kabas. Full source links on the episode page.
